---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Is this related to an existing issue?

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Mockups, diagrams, or any other context.
